'''fopadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbalistic|cabbalistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbalistic|cabbalistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fopadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopadhithi|fopadhithi]] || [[word:fopadhiji|fopadhiji]] || [[word:fopadhishi|fopadhishi]] || [[word:fopadhiki|fopadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopadhuthuthu|fopadhuthuthu]] || [[word:fopadhujuju|fopadhujuju]] || [[word:fopadhushushu|fopadhushushu]] || [[word:fopadhukuku|fopadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopadhuthu|fopadhuthu]] || [[word:fopadhuju|fopadhuju]] || [[word:fopadhushu|fopadhushu]] || [[word:fopadhuku|fopadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopadhufthuf|fopadhufthuf]] || [[word:fopadhufjuf|fopadhufjuf]] || [[word:fopadhufshuf|fopadhufshuf]] || [[word:fopadhufkuf|fopadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopadhethe|fopadhethe]] || [[word:fopadheje|fopadheje]] || [[word:fopadheshe|fopadheshe]] || [[word:fopadheke|fopadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopadhothotho|fopadhothotho]] || [[word:fopadhojojo|fopadhojojo]] || [[word:fopadhoshosho|fopadhoshosho]] || [[word:fopadhokoko|fopadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopadhotho|fopadhotho]] || [[word:fopadhojo|fopadhojo]] || [[word:fopadhosho|fopadhosho]] || [[word:fopadhoko|fopadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopadhofthof|fopadhofthof]] || [[word:fopadhofjof|fopadhofjof]] || [[word:fopadhofshof|fopadhofshof]] || [[word:fopadhofkof|fopadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopadhïfthïf|fopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfjïf|fopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfshïf|fopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfkïf|fopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopadhïfthïfthïf|fopadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfjïfjïf|fopadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfshïfshïf|fopadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfkïfkïf|fopadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopadhïfthïf|fopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfjïf|fopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfshïf|fopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfkïf|fopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopadhïfthïf|fopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfjïf|fopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfshïf|fopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fopadhïfkïf|fopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopadhæthæ|fopadhæthæ]] || [[word:fopadhæjæ|fopadhæjæ]] || [[word:fopadhæshæ|fopadhæshæ]] || [[word:fopadhækæ|fopadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopadhathatha|fopadhathatha]] || [[word:fopadhajaja|fopadhajaja]] || [[word:fopadhashasha|fopadhashasha]] || [[word:fopadhakaka|fopadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopadhatha|fopadhatha]] || [[word:fopadhaja|fopadhaja]] || [[word:fopadhasha|fopadhasha]] || [[word:fopadhaka|fopadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopadhafthaf|fopadhafthaf]] || [[word:fopadhafjaf|fopadhafjaf]] || [[word:fopadhafshaf|fopadhafshaf]] || [[word:fopadhafkaf|fopadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fopadhasha|fopadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopadhshësha|fopadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopadhrosha|fopadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopadhmusha|fopadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopadhyasha|fopadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopadhnkshësha|gofopadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopadhnkrosha|gofopadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopadhnkmusha|gofopadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopadhnkyasha|gofopadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fopapadhasha|fopapadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopapadhshësha|fopapadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopapadhrosha|fopapadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopapadhmusha|fopapadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopapadhyasha|fopapadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopapadhnkshësha|gofopapadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopapadhnkrosha|gofopapadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopapadhnkmusha|gofopapadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopapadhnkyasha|gofopapadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fepædhasha|fepædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fepædhshësha|fepædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fepædhrosha|fepædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fepædhmusha|fepædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fepædhyasha|fepædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofepædhnkshësha|gofepædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofepædhnkrosha|gofepædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofepædhnkmusha|gofepædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofepædhnkyasha|gofepædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fopfadhasha|fopfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopfadhshësha|fopfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopfadhrosha|fopfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopfadhmusha|fopfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopfadhyasha|fopfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopfadhnkshësha|gofopfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopfadhnkrosha|gofopfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopfadhnkmusha|gofopfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopfadhnkyasha|gofopfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
